title: Orgs Index
description: Validates _orgs/index.yaml — the org-slug registry per spec § 3. First skill to /init for a new org writes here. Slug canonicalization prevents duplicate orgs and split institutional memory.

schema_version.description: Semver for the index schema. Minimal schema per founder decision (§ 3).

last_updated.description: ISO 8601 date of the last modification to this file.

orgs.description: Registry of all known org slugs. Skills must pick from this list or explicitly create a new entry.

org_slug.description: Canonical org slug per § 3 B1. Renames not supported in v1 — pick carefully at creation.

created_date.description: ISO 8601 date when this org was first registered.

created_by_skill.description: The skill that ran /init and first registered this org.

status.description: active: has recent activity. dormant: no activity in 18mo. archived: operator explicitly closed per § 3.

transition_complete.description: Dual-write transition flag per § 15.4. false during retrofit window (some skills not yet upgraded). Flips to true after all 4 retrofits ship and dual-write cleanup /build runs.
